questions.question: 6 (a) In a sport, teams are given points using the formula number of points = number of wins # 4 + number of draws # 2 + bonus points. One team has 15 wins, 7 draws and 6 bonus points. Calculate the total number of points for this team. ................................................. [2] (b) Solve. x 2 18 = x = ................................................ [1] (c) Solve.
